summary: Reframed the opening to avoid repeating Chapter 6's manuscript-in-room setup and added a closing bridge that motivates Gavin shifting his reading into bed-curtain isolation after the Great Hall overload.
edits: Rewrote the opening setup so the chapter begins on Gavin crossing out a failed approximation instead of another static manuscript tableau.
Kept the original sub-collection information and tone while changing the opening's temporal and spatial emphasis.
Added a closing decision that he will only reopen the manuscript behind his bed curtains, tightening continuity into Chapter 6.
